description_long: This is a classic rectangular wooden picnic table with two attached benches running parallel to the longer sides of the tabletop. The tabletop consists of several evenly spaced wooden planks, providing a sturdy and flat surface for dining or gathering. The benches are constructed from similar wooden planks and are supported by robust wooden legs and crossbeams, ensuring stability and durability. The legs are angled outward for additional support, and diagonal braces connect the legs to the benches and tabletop. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the table a natural and rustic appearance suitable for outdoor environments. There is no visible hole in the center of the tabletop for an umbrella.
description: A sturdy wooden picnic table with two attached benches and a slatted tabletop, featuring visible wood grain and robust support beams.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the tabletop and one bench, with the supporting legs and crossbeams visible underneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the table and benches, as well as the slatted design of the tabletop and the angled support legs.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, showing the opposite bench and the same structural features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, displaying the lengthwise arrangement of the tabletop and benches.
attribute_tabletop_support_structure: The tabletop is supported by four sturdy wooden legs angled outward, reinforced by horizontal crossbeams and diagonal braces connecting the legs to the benches and tabletop.
